scenarios.title: AI performance supercycle
scenarios.blurb: AI-driven productivity gains flow through corporate earnings broadly.

y5.txt: Effect broadens across the portfolio as AI productivity gains reach a wide range of businesses.

y10.txt: Structural GDP acceleration re-rates the whole portfolio; chips and AI platforms remain the core growth leaders.

scenarios.title: Full Fed easing cycle
scenarios.blurb: The Fed completes a full rate-cut cycle as inflation cools.

y5.txt: Rates normalize; payments and asset-management names track fundamentals rather than rate expectations, high-beta names get a tailwind.

y10.txt: A new secular rate level is set; valuations reflect real business growth rather than cheap money.

scenarios.title: Inflation returns / stagflation
scenarios.blurb: Inflation proves sticky, the Fed holds or hikes again, growth is weak.

y5.txt: Multiples compress across most of the portfolio; only cash-generative names hold up relatively well.

y10.txt: Portfolio re-rated structurally lower unless offset by an AI productivity effect; leveraged crypto-balance-sheet exposure is especially vulnerable.

scenarios.title: US–China geopolitical escalation
scenarios.blurb: Rising tension around Taiwan plus a new tariff war.

y5.txt: Supply chains re-route; reshoring partly benefits US chip names while Taiwan-based manufacturing is directly exposed.

y10.txt: A durably split US/China tech ecosystem forms; defense and AI-government positioning become structural advantages.

scenarios.title: Mainstream crypto legalization
scenarios.blurb: A comprehensive global framework legitimizes crypto as an asset class.

y5.txt: Institutional adoption expands; balance-sheet and infrastructure crypto exposure benefit directly, rest of the portfolio barely touched.

y10.txt: Digital assets go mainstream; a light tailwind reaches the wider portfolio through embedded crypto rails in payments and finance.

scenarios.title: Global recession / credit crisis
scenarios.blurb: A synchronized downturn with credit contraction; demand falls broadly.

y5.txt: Uneven recovery: strong-balance-sheet names recover fastest, high-beta and leveraged names fall harder than the market.

y10.txt: If the portfolio avoided forced selling, composition proves resilient long-term, though decade returns trail the base case.

scenarios.title: Big Tech antitrust breakup
scenarios.blurb: US and EU regulators force large platforms to separate business lines.

y5.txt: Regulatory action advances in parts of the market; a sum-of-parts unlock plays out for some platform names.

y10.txt: Separated entities may trade at a premium or discount to the old combined value; a more fragmented market changes chip demand structure.

scenarios.title: EV price war & China dominance
scenarios.blurb: Chinese EV makers reach global scale and cost leadership.

y5.txt: A dominant Chinese EV player emerges; the US incumbent faces direct pricing pressure and share loss, chip suppliers benefit from higher content per vehicle.

y10.txt: Global auto industry restructures around Chinese EV leadership; competition shifts from price to autonomy and software.

scenarios.title: Quantum computing breakthrough
scenarios.blurb: Practical quantum computing emerges, threatening classical encryption.

y5.txt: A transition to post-quantum cryptography begins; payments and crypto-balance-sheet names face temporary cost and risk, cybersecurity and cloud/chip names benefit from the upgrade cycle.

y10.txt: Post-quantum security becomes the industry standard; payment and crypto risk is resolved, hardware demand is structurally higher across the board.

scenarios.title: Climate transition acceleration
scenarios.blurb: Aggressive global carbon regulation reshapes transport, travel and computing.

y5.txt: Decarbonization economics reshuffle logistics, travel and energy; EV names get a policy tailwind while data-center energy use draws regulatory attention.

y10.txt: The climate transition becomes a completed structural shift; EV names are the main beneficiaries, travel and defense names adapt to the new energy cost base.
